items.q: How do I apply for B.Tech?
items.a: Use the official SRMJEEE (UG) admissions portal and follow the engineering admission page instructions.

items.q: Where do I check official fee details?
items.a: Use the relevant program admission page and the public disclosure / scholarship pages for the latest published information.
Use infodesk@srmist.edu.in or the official website contact details published by SRMIST.
